references.relevance: Vertical rail with content rendered inline per event. Matches Part A target layout.
Inline milestone blocks with per-milestone content editable in place.
Teachers click a student in the grades/classwork list to drill into that student's submission view — analogous to Part B.
Teacher can add/edit journal items under a student account. Attribution is subtle.
Considered for P2 sticky rail; not adopted in v2.
